justification: The diff correctly updates Java version to 21, migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, and removes redundant @Autowired annotations (constructor injection is default in Spring Boot 3). However, it only uses one Java 21 idiom (getFirst() instead of get(0)), and the Spring Boot upgrade from 2.6.3 to 3.3.13 is a major version jump that may introduce breaking changes beyond just Java 21 migration. The diff is coherent with minimal churn.
